elements.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login

steps.name: the app is launched
Verify the "Digitization" screen is displayed
the user clicks on Next
Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed
the user clicks on Next again
Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed
the user clicks on Finish
Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible
the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed

elements.name: Verify user is able to login successfully

steps.name: the user is on the login screen
the user enters email "anilkumar.m@apms.ai"
the user enters password "1234"
the user clicks on Login
Verify the user should be logged in successfully
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Product Groups" feature

elements.name: Search and open Edit Product Group popup

steps.name: User clicks on profile icon
verify that the "Account Preferences" screen is displayed
User clicks on "Configurations" section
verify the "Product" section is displayed
User clicks on "Product Groups" feature
verify user navigates to "Product Groups" list screen
User has already created a Product Group
User clicks on search icon
User taps on search input field
User clears existing text in search field
User enters newly created Product Group Name
User waits for search results to load
system should display matching product group results
User verifies product group appears in list
User swipes product group record from right to left
Edit option should be visible
User clicks on Edit button
"Edit Product Group" popup should be displayed
Product Group ID should be visible and non-editable
Product Group Name field should be pre-filled
Product Group Code field should be pre-filled
Description field should be pre-filled
Product Group Name field should be editable
Product Group Code field should be editable
Description field should be editable
Save button should be visible
Close "X" button should be visible
User clicks Close "X" button
User clicks search close X button
search field should be closed
module list should be in normal state
User should return to Product Groups list screen
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Product Groups" feature

elements.name: Update Product Group with all fields

steps.name: User has already created a Product Group
User clicks on search icon
User taps on search input field
User clears existing text in search field
User enters newly created Product Group Name
User waits for search results to load
system should display matching product group results
User verifies product group appears in list
User swipes product group record from right to left
Edit option should be visible
User clicks on Edit button
"Edit Product Group" popup should be displayed
User updates Product Group Name with valid value
User updates Product Group Code with valid value
User updates Description
User clicks Save button
Product Group should be updated successfully
updated data should be reflected in Product Groups list screen
User clicks search close X button
search field should be closed
module list should be in normal state
User should return to Product Groups list screen
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Product Groups" feature
